title: Pineapple pudding
excerpt: My dear Vinette Ebrahim took me straight back to those old church bazaars we used to have. This pudding in our house was called "bazaar pudding".
html: My dear Vinette Ebrahim took me straight back to those old church bazaars we used to have. This pudding in our house was called “bazaar pudding”.

steps: Make up the jelly according to the instructions on the packets. Use some of the pineapple syrup as part of the 2 cups of cold water.
Put it in the fridge until the jelly is just starting to set.
Whisk in the Ideal Milk and pineapple.
Leave to set overnight in one large bowl or in pretty little containers.
